text:
First Steps Perinatal Treatment Program | Sutter County, CA
Show/Hide
ROAD CLOSURES
COMMUNITY ACADEMY
The First Steps Perinatal Program provides SUD outpatient and intensive outpatient treatment services to pregnant or parenting women struggling with a Substance Use Disorder.  The program provides a supportive, women only, environment, evidence-based treatment, individual and group counseling, parenting, and life skills. Cooperative child care is available on-site for women enrolled in treatment and parenting infants and/or small children (ages 1 month to 5 years).  Admission preference is given to women who are pregnant injecting drug users, pregnant substance users and substance using women with dependent children.

New Clients/Intakes:
Walk-in, telephone, or tele-health screenings are available Tuesday 9:00am – 4:00pm, and Wednesday 12:30pm – 4:00pm
Call for information anytime 8:00am – 5:00pm Monday – Thursday (530) 822-7263
